title: scutellaria attenuifolia
intro: Scutellaria attenuifolia, also known as California skullcap, is a perennial herb native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria attenuifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal supplements and traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
